decisions.rationale: Observation describes M15 local/limited service on the First Avenue/Second Avenue corridor. The base_record_id route_m15-local-limited already exists in the registry with alias route_m15-serving-corridor-2010, matching this observation exactly. The closest canonical record IS the observation's own base_record_id, so this is new (already resolved).

A map of the First Avenue/Second Avenue SBS corridor in Manhattan, showing the route from South Ferry to 125th Street.

decisions.rationale: Observation describes proposed M15 Select Bus Service on the First Avenue/Second Avenue corridor, replacing M15 Limited. The base_record_id route_m15-sbs already exists in the registry with alias route_m15-sbs-proposed-2010, matching this observation. The closest canonical record IS the observation's own base_record_id, so this is new.

proposed_relations.description: M15 SBS is proposed to replace M15 Limited service on the First Avenue/Second Avenue corridor
